title: TVS Supply Chain Solutions is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: TVS Supply Chain Solutions is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Tiruchirappalli location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About TVS Supply Chain Solutions:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TVS Supply Chain Solutions!
